/** * Render route-managed head tags (title, meta, links, styles, head scripts). * Place inside the document head of your app shell. * * Development version: filters out dev styles link after hydration and * includes a fallback cleanup effect for hydration mismatch cases. * * @link https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/document-head-management */ export declare function HeadContent(): import("react/jsx-runtime").JSX.Element;
